# 新闻速递 2026-03-23

## Shopee
- Shopee积极参与多平台家居厨房用品促销，推出多款优惠商品，旨在吸引消费者并提升其市场竞争力。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxNWUZzdmRaUk1hSzBfcFpKb29jUTYyaTRBZlVFaDJjbFNQRk9FSHlfR0xOVjJoWWtUcl80RGNrck9NYlJsc1FFUU9BWWhjd3Q3Z1NPMTc5SFk2bXB1eUlld3VMQy1ZWU1wSlJpWldYaUNFNlRjbTlKQzRlSUxQVUpBeHowXzlNYno5RjlsLUNBVjhma0ZvcUhJWE44SUhqdFllZ2pmc3JEZzhIaDJETk1iVlhoTTFibkRjY2c?oc=5)）
- Shopee上架电视调谐器用同轴连接器转换器等电子配件，扩展产品线，旨在满足特定消费者需求并提升平台销售。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxNSkpfSnJIX1k0dlY3d3hGWnpjaXVpSmZRZXlkQU1tVjBzblF5S2sxX1QzM0toV0FZbUM4NHpIZGxtZ0dlWTd6QmRnVGs1bEYwenBRNjZvcVV3U0ZnTW9pdFpxUm5LalE2a2dKQ2EzSl9EWEJnRmdTcUwwUG5IM3VJeExDMHpobnF3dHkzR1F0MA?oc=5)）
- AnyMind Group在马来西亚获得Shopee官方MCN认证，成为其合作伙伴，有望扩大电商营销影响力，为Shopee引入更多内容创作者。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMia0FVX3lxTE0tdkN5RTZvQ1JlLWI5Z0dSSUpNbGU4am8zYm1zaFc5ZlNTR3hReTBoZFVrZVRLS2NvZnRULUoybzlGTGlQajRLOGlOYUg4RlVpQUNBd09EQWkwd1R5YVBMZU8tLVhBQmhYY09B?oc=5)）

## Coupang
- Coupang与Shinsegae展开AI技术竞争，通过AI提升运营和用户体验，旨在争夺韩国零售市场主导地位。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTE9PTUJ5Z1VhSGZ2YVNNRDdCLWJoSnlWSTMyVUI5a0NRekdzMjd5WzFnWWhicExaSkhPQzMtQ1h4RWFYTGFxSDlOaGV4b1h0c0c4OWhJbmcxV1U0a1ByLUNXc3p4QVlXQWdLRVQwQjJFaTJnRWt6SXNLNUFB?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre股价在经历一年下滑后，市场对其进行重新评估，复杂估值信号影响投资者判断，未来增长潜力需谨慎审视。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
